Sangha Democracy is a theory of [[theodemocracy]] developed by [[Kamidere]] in response to the [[2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]]

It influenced the idea of the [[Sanhedrin]]

== See Also ==

* [[Sangha Democracy (video)]]

[[Category:Politics]]
[[Category:Sanhedrin]]
[[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Democracy]]
[[Category:Types of democracy]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
